title: Fix all spec evaluation findings
description: Apply all remediations from the specification evaluation diagnostic across all 10 openspec specs. Covers COHR-3.1 (CRITICAL), COHR-3.2, COHR-3.3, COMP-1.1 through COMP-1.12, CORR-2.1, CORR-2.2, CORR-2.3, and ISO-4.1 through ISO-4.4.
close_reason: Applied all 20 spec evaluation findings across 10 specs: COHR-3.1/3.2/3.3, COMP-1.1-1.12, CORR-2.1/2.2/2.3, ISO-4.1/4.2. Added 5 new requirements, expanded 4 existing requirements, added terminology section, architecture notes, and requirement IDs to all 86 requirements.
